body:
Yes, **Valiant Garage Door** (based in Pleasanton, CA) installs Wi-Fi-enabled smart garage door openers. [Valiant Garage Door Reviews - Pleasanton, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.ValiantGarageDoorLLC.161142799.html)

They offer smart garage opener installations—frequently utilizing top-tier brands like **LiftMaster** equipped with **myQ** smart home technology. These Wi-Fi-connected setups allow you to: [LiftMaster Garage Door Openers | Valiant](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-openers#:~:text=It%20is%20a%20strong%20fit,Price%3A%20%24599)

  * Open, close, and check your garage door's status remotely via a smartphone app. [The 6 Best Smart Garage Door Openers of 2025 - Family Handyman](https://www.familyhandyman.com/list/best-smart-garage-door-openers/#:~:text=Beyond%20how%20quiet%20and%20bright,an%20extra%20sense%20of%20security.)

  * Get real-time notifications when the door is used. [The 6 Best Smart Garage Door Openers of 2025 - Family Handyman](https://www.familyhandyman.com/list/best-smart-garage-door-openers/#:~:text=Beyond%20how%20quiet%20and%20bright,an%20extra%20sense%20of%20security.)

  * Integrate with smart home ecosystems and secure delivery services (like Amazon Key). [Best Smart Garage Door Controllers for 2026: Retrofits, Smart Motors and More - CNET](https://www.cnet.com/home/smart-home/best-smart-garage-door-opener-controller/)

Their smart opener installations generally range from **$499 to $799** , depending on the specific model (such as wall-mount space-savers or heavy-duty belt/chain drives) and whether you choose premium add-ons like battery backups or integrated cameras. [Valiant Garage Door Reviews - Pleasanton, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.ValiantGarageDoorLLC.161142799.html)
